taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Analysis, Data Scientist
core_skills: Data visualization tools, SQL, Data analysis, Data manipulation, Statistical analysis
skill_match_scores: Data visualization tools:1.0, SQL:1.0, Data analysis:1.0, Data manipulation:1.0, Statistical analysis:1.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's Degree in computer science, statistics, mathematics, or relevant discipline, 1-3 years of automotive operations experience, or similar business (quick-paced environment), Experience with data visualization tools (Tableau, PowerBI, etc.), SQL skills for querying relational databases, Experience with complex data analysis, Performing data manipulation and statistical analysis, Strong analytical skills with ability to understand and communicate the meaning of the data being presented, Excellent Mathematical/Statistical and Logic skills, Excellent Reasoning skills, Full Professional Proficiency in English is required
preferred_quals: Training/Learning operations experience preferred, Multi-dimensional reporting, data correlation, data analytics and data mining, Previous external client facing experience, Experience with ETL tools (SSIS, Alteryx, KNIME, etc.), Experience supporting a Training, Learning, Development or Talent Management team, Knowledge Retention - In order to provide the highest quality of work, analysts must be able to learn and memorize a large amount of information, Detail Oriented – Analysts must be able to focus on the details in order to identify and isolate issues, Organizational Skills – Analysts must be organized and able to keep track of multiple projects at once, Flexibility - Analysts must be able to handle multiple tasks at once and follow changes in priority level, Speed - Must be able to work quickly and efficiently without sacrificing the quality of their work
core_responsibilities: Develop insightful KPI reporting dashboards to drive decision-making and performance tracking, Develop reports and dashboards via data mining analytics and reporting tools, Prepare analytics reports in presentation form, Assist in developing sound data ETL practices and processes, Conduct research and analyze special studies when needed, Create and update documentation of process flows and business rules, Maintain current reports up to date and process large amounts of data as needed
job_summary: MSX International is a trusted partner to leading vehicle manufacturers and mobility organizations, helping clients transform their businesses. They are seeking a Data Analyst responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining business data models to provide insights into customer data, while also developing analytic reports and dashboards.
